extractedPrompt:
Subject: A professional studio portrait of a young woman with freckles and striking green eyes.
Composition: Close-up headshot, centered framing, 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8 aperture for shallow depth of field.
Lighting/Camera: Soft butterfly lighting setup, rim light highlighting hair texture, shot on Phase One XF IQ4, high dynamic range.
Style/References: Photorealistic, editorial fashion photography, ultra-detailed skin texture, 8k resolution, neutral grey backdrop.
Constraints/Exclusions: No jewelry, no heavy makeup, no background clutter, no distortion.
